ab: msu’i cu mosa m’was biru sasan la.
en: I was late for school this morning.

ab: mosa cu pwasan biru ga, yngyan mu maras kabang la.
ch: 去學校的時候，我忘了帶書包。
en: When I was going to school, I forgot to bring my backpack.
I didn't bring anything with me.

ab: m’was biru ga, ms’un cu gluw m’was biru mita biru ppwasun.
ch: 上課的時候，我和同學一起看課本。
en: During class, I and my classmates read the textbook together.

ab: pcpung miru ga, syugan cu nya bbrwan ru ccong nku gluw m’was biru.
ch: 考試的時候，同學借我筆和橡皮擦。
en: During the exam, a classmate lent me a pen and an eraser.

ab: kyalun cu nya psba biru maha, “babaw nya ga helaw hayi mtuli, iya ksu’i la!”
ch: 老師跟我說：「下次早點起床，不要再遲到了!」
en: The teacher told me, "Wake up earlier next time and don't be late again!"
